name: Spinach in Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach thoroughly in running water until free from grit.
2. Press the spinach into a saucepan, add a very small quantity of water, or cover the pan and cook the spinach in the water which clings to the leaves.
3. Cook for about 10 minutes, or until wilted, stirring occasionally so that it cooks evenly.
4. Drain and chop the spinach very fine.
5. Melt the butter in a saucepan, add the cream and salt, and when hot, add the chopped spinach without any liquid.
6. Simmer for a few minutes longer. Add more salt if needed.
7. Serve at once.
